name: Aerosol Chemical Composition and Size Distribution from PS106/1 Cruise (May 2017)
description: Dataset containing measurements of aerosol chemical composition and size distribution collected during the PS106/1 cruise in May 2017. The data includes concentrations of major ions (Cl-, NO3-, SO4 2-, C2O4 2-, NO2-, Br-, F-, MSA, PO4 3-, Na+, NH4+, K+, Mg2+) across specific aerosol size ranges (0.05-0.14 µm), along with associated metadata such as sample IDs, stage, height, and precise spatial-temporal coordinates (latitude, longitude, date/time) for sampling locations.
